task_description: Fix the batch-module alignment issue across all roles in the Institute ERP system. Batches and modules are not properly connected in the UI - backend responses lack module/batch relationship data, field names mismatch between frontend expectations and backend responses, and the trainer dashboard endpoint is missing entirely.

verification.summary: All 31 backend tests pass (4 new tests for batch-module alignment). Frontend build (tsc + vite) completes cleanly with no TypeScript errors. New tests properly exercise the added code paths and would fail if changes were reverted.
